title: boronia ledifolia var. rubiginosa
intro: Boronia ledifolia var. rubiginosa, also known as the rusty boronia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Boronia ledifolia var. rubiginosa is often used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, perfumes, and skincare products.
